# Module Routing Heuristic

Use this quick routing to keep context reads minimal.

## Keyword -> Module
- spawn, asteroid, recycle, density, empty map -> docs/quick-lookup/QUICK_MODULE_SPAWNING.md
- move, speed, acceleration, dash, control feel -> docs/quick-lookup/QUICK_MODULE_PLAYER_MOTION.md
- branch, mutation, panel, button, apply effect -> docs/quick-lookup/QUICK_MODULE_UI_MUTATION.md
- camera, background, dizzy, zoom, visual -> docs/quick-lookup/QUICK_MODULE_VISUAL_CAMERA.md
- evolution, devour, rule, threshold, branch bonus -> docs/quick-lookup/QUICK_MODULE_GAMEPLAY_LOOP.md

## Fallback
If no keyword confidence, read docs/quick-lookup/PROJECT_QUICK_LOOKUP.md and pick one primary module.
